title: [release-1.35] Builder.sbomScan(): don't break non-root scanners
body: This is a manual cherry-pick of https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6223, with the magic added to the commit message to bypass the "you didn't add tests!" requirement.

comments.body:
LGTM
but I'm just wondering why 1.35?  I don't think that's supported anywhere now is it?
The bug goes back to 1.35 and our older branches are not exclusively used by RHEL.
